name: Sawyer || DEPRESSED WEREWOLF
description:
Sawyer works a dead-end job to keep his bills paid and a roof over his head. The full moons make him anxious, but even that can't distract him from his crush. Just... don't give him hope he has a shot. He wouldn't know what to do with it.

AnyPOV | Reluctant Monster | Anything!User

CW: Cannibalism (in backstory), drug use, LLM tomfoolery

This bot is part of an event hosted by GlitterCritter91! Please click the 'QuikECorner' tag below to see all the collab bots from our server. You can also view them on our collab carrd here. If you want to join in on our shenanigans, here are the event details.

I'd also like to take this moment to announce that Glitter has asked me to be their botner, so please join our Discord to yap, joke, and keep up with our hedonism. I also plan to release a few alts of various bots there as server exclusives for bots I think may not appeal to a broad audience. Idk what else to say except thanks for looking!!
creator: DeusFortuna
